title: Combination Set Square, Preciva Carpenter Engineer Marking Gauge 45/90 Degrees with Bubble Level, Adjustable Carpenters Square Woodworking Rule, 12inch/300mm Measuring Tool
features: 🔖Enhanced Durability---- Crafted from thickened aluminum alloy, this engineer marking gauge features a durable 5mm-thick body, ensuring long-lasting performance and a refined working grip feel.
🔖Adjustable Metal Support---- Equipped with a retractable metal support, this woodworking rule offers exceptional stability and prevents slipping, making it a favorite among carpenters.

🔖Versatile Marking Angles---- Designed with graduations every 1 cm for precise markings, as well as built-in 45° and 90° angles, this carpenter set square is perfect for detailed woodworking, making it a crucial asset for accuracy.
🔖300 mm Measuring Scale---- Featuring a 300 mm measuring scale, providing accurate measurements ideal for both professional and DIY projects, ensuring precision for carpentry and crafting.

🔖Wide Applications---- Ideal for professional and home use, this adjustable angle ruler is versatile for woodworking, DIY projects, and crafting. Include: combination square *1, user manual *1, making it an essential addition to any carpenter's toolkit.
description: Product Description Explore the perfect companion for woodworking art - the Preciva Woodworking Square, renowned for its versatility and precision, making it an indispensable tool on your workbench. This square effortlessly marks straight lines and vertical lines with precision for both 90-degree and 45-degree angles. Featuring fine metric scales and a 300mm ruler body, it provides ample measuring range. The design includes small holes every 1 centimeter for quick and easy marking of horizontal lines. Crafted from solid aluminum alloy, this square ensures durability with a robust 5mm thickness, guaranteeing stability over long-term use. Whether you're a professional woodworker or a DIY enthusiast, this woodworking square is your reliable assistant for achieving creative and precise work. 90-degree Angle Marking Line The 90-degree marking line of this woodworking square ensures precise woodworking. Whether sketching furniture designs or engaged in construction, it facilitates accurate vertical and horizontal lines, ensuring professional standards in every measurement and marking. 45-degree Angle Marking Line The 45-degree angle marking line is ideal for framing doors, windows, and picture frames, enhancing the overall aesthetic and harmony of spaces. Such precise angles not only bring visual balance but also ensure structural stability and symmetry. Product Details 5mm Thicken Ruler Constructed from a solid 5mm thick ruler, this durable woodworking ruler ensures a long lifespan. Detachable Ruler The ruler can detach for separate use by loosening the nut. Note: For easier reattachment during assembly, loosen the nut further to widen the gap. 1cm Interval It allows you to draw horizontal lines at every 1 cm interval without needing to repeatedly slide the ruler, greatly enhancing efficiency. Aluminum Alloy Ruler Entirely crafted from solid aluminum alloy, with a thickened metal base, it combines high quality with precision. Support Arm Extension Design Our ruler features a unique support arm extension that not only provides unparalleled stability but also ensures safety during use. Once opened, it securely fixes onto the tabletop, eliminating concerns about the ruler slipping accidentally. This enhances efficiency and professionalism in your work, allowing you to focus more effectively on your woodworking tasks.
